summary: Critical issues prevent shipping: (1) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA (security/stability violation), (2) DependencyLicenseChecker.Tests.ps1 referenced in workflow but NOT PROVIDED—task explicitly requires Pester tests first via TDD, (3) test-fixtures/package.json and license-config.json referenced but missing—workflow will fail immediately, (4) test-workflow.ps1 has severe code duplication (lines 20-30 vs 60-70 identical repo setup) and uses heredoc syntax incompatible with Windows PowerShell, (5) missing .actrc. Core logic is sound (Parse-PackageJson, Check-LicenseCompliance, Export-ComplianceReport) but ~30% of deliverable is absent. Act runs will fail on missing fixtures. Violates core TDD requirement—tests must exist and pass.
